caseID.title: caseID
caseID.description: This is the ID of the support case created by the flow when the flow encounters an error when trying to create a Refund Request Record. In the case of an error, present the User with the Case's number and notify them that there has been an error.

customersOrders.title: customersOrders
customersOrders.description: Returns the 5 most recent orders made by the customer. Be sure to list their names, numbers, and order dates to the customer in the case that the customer doesn't know their order number.

orderProducts.title: orderProducts
orderProducts.description: This is the record variable of the Order Products when an order is found but no matching Order Products, if this variable is empty let the customer know we weren't able to find their exact Order Product per the product name they mentioned, and ask if one of these Order Products is the one they have an issue with.

refundRequestOut.title: refundRequestOut
refundRequestOut.description: The created refund request. Present this record's details to the customer once created including the Refund Request Number and Comments.
